scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w apps/api
scripts.build: CI=false && npm run db:generate -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:all: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.ci: npm run db:generate -w apps/api && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:all
